_: Expected repo-level settings for t4sh/skills4sh. Snapshot maintained alongside .github/branch-protection.expected.json — see REPO_SETTINGS.md. Drift is checked daily by .github/workflows/repo-settings-drift.yml. To intentionally change a setting: update the live value on github.com (Settings → General → Pull Requests), then update this file in the same PR (the drift check on the PR is the verification step).
